narration: Here's what science actually says about IQ.

narration: IQ tests measure a range of cognitive abilities, not just what you think.

narration: It includes problem-solving, reasoning, and even your ability to learn.

narration: Research shows that while IQ can predict academic success, it doesn't measure creativity or emotional intelligence.

narration: So, IQ is just one piece of a much bigger puzzle of intelligence.
